recruitment.description: Kana joins automatically after the map is completed.

recruitmentNotes: Kana appears during Dragon Blood as an uncontrolled dragon NPC; the playable Nohr Prince or Princess joins after the chapter ends.

baseStatFormula.childAptitude: child personal base + automatic-growth stat gains
baseStatFormula.promotedClassAptitude: promoted-class growth rate * (automatic-growth levels beyond the unpromoted cap - 1) / 100
baseStatFormula.parentInheritanceValue: max(0, parent personal base + parent level-up gains - child aptitude - promoted-class aptitude)
baseStatFormula.parentStatInput: Use only the parent's fixed personal value plus stat points earned through level-ups. Exclude class bases, permanent stat-booster items, Pair Up, equipment, meals, tonics, statues, and other external bonuses.
baseStatFormula.inheritanceBonus: min(floor((father inheritance value + mother inheritance value) / 4), floor(2 + child aptitude / 10))
baseStatFormula.finalStat: child personal base + current class base + automatic-growth stat gains + inheritance bonus
baseStatFormula.rounding: Floor the inheritance division and cap; round the promoted-class aptitude to the nearest integer with exact halves rounded up.
baseStatFormula.offspringSealNote: For an unpromoted child, promoted-class aptitude is zero and the formula reduces to the commonly circulated C form. Offspring Seal calculations must split the promoted-class aptitude instead of treating every level as one N * combined-growth term.

mapLevelScaling.note: Children use internal level 10. Before promotion, their displayed level follows the applicable map level once it exceeds 10. From Chapter 19 onward, the Offspring Seal promotes them and converts map level 22-38 into promoted level 2-18 by subtracting the promoted internal-level offset of 20.

provenance.locator: Kana > Fates recruitment, inventory, and starting ranks
Kana/Stats > level-10 bases and scaling
Nohr Prince / Princess and promotion rows
Children: internal level 10 and map-level / Offspring Seal relationship

baseStatFormula.inheritanceBonus: min(floor((father inheritance value + mother inheritance value) / 4), floor(2 + child aptitude / 10))
baseStatFormula.finalStat: child personal base + current class base + automatic-growth stat gains + inheritance bonus
baseStatFormula.rounding: Floor the inheritance division and cap; round the promoted-class aptitude to the nearest integer with exact halves rounded up.
baseStatFormula.offspringSealNote: For an unpromoted child, promoted-class aptitude is zero and the formula reduces to the commonly circulated C form. Offspring Seal calculations must split the promoted-class aptitude instead of treating every level as one N * combined-growth term.

mapLevelScaling.note: Children use internal level 10. Before promotion, their displayed level follows the applicable map level once it exceeds 10. From Chapter 19 onward, the Offspring Seal promotes them and converts map level 22-38 into promoted level 2-18 by subtracting the promoted internal-level offset of 20.
